featureName: SMS Agent — Conversational AI via SMS
description: Extend the WhatsApp AI conversation engine to support SMS. Same flow (routing by sender phone, AI triage, intervention creation) but via SMS channel. Reuse 90% of existing code by adding a channel field.

userStories.title: Add channel field to types + sessions DB
userStories.description: As the system, I need a channel discriminator so the engine knows whether to reply via SMS or WhatsApp
userStories.notes: Migration 20260329084439. MessageChannel type + channel field on IncomingWhatsAppMessage.

userStories.title: Adapt twilio-whatsapp.service for SMS
userStories.description: As the system, I need the message sending service to handle both SMS and WhatsApp so replies go through the right channel
acceptanceCriteria: sendMessage() adds whatsapp: prefix only when channel is 'whatsapp'
SMS replies have no prefix on From/To
userStories.notes: formatPhone() helper. All send functions accept optional channel param with default 'whatsapp'.

userStories.title: Create SMS webhook /api/webhooks/sms
userStories.description: As a tenant, I want to send an SMS to report a maintenance issue so I can use the AI assistant without WhatsApp
acceptanceCriteria: Routing by sender phone (same as WhatsApp)
Message passed to conversation engine with channel='sms'
userStories.notes: Thin adapter (12 lines) — imports handleTwilioIncoming from WhatsApp route.

userStories.title: Adapt conversation engine for SMS channel
userStories.description: As the system, I need the conversation engine to send shorter replies via SMS and track the channel in sessions
acceptanceCriteria: Session created with correct channel value
AI system prompt includes 'respond concisely' instruction for SMS
Replies sent via correct channel (SMS or WhatsApp)
Routing flow works for SMS (disambiguation, unknown contact)
userStories.notes: 9 sendWhatsAppMessage calls updated with channel param. createRoutingSession stores channel. buildSystemPrompt uses shorter lengthRule for SMS.

userStories.title: Configure webhook + env + cleanup
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the SMS webhook documented and the env vars updated
userStories.notes: Updated .env.example with SMS webhook path + removed stale Meta WABA env vars. Lint: 0 new errors. Tests: pre-existing integration failures only.
